description:
GCP RemoteStackManagement ImportData — cross-project service account
the manager impersonates.

managementPermissionsApplied.description:
Whether the management role binding was attached by the
generated stack.

projectId.description: Project ID containing the management service account.

projectNumber.description: Numeric project number containing the management service account.

serviceAccountEmail.description: Service account email the manager impersonates.

serviceAccountUniqueId.description: Stable unique id Google assigns to the service account.
